task_description: Write an incident report for a database outage that caused 45 minutes of downtime on a production e-commerce platform.

input_data.system: Production PostgreSQL cluster for e-commerce platform
input_data.context: During peak traffic hours, the primary PostgreSQL database ran out of disk space due to an unmonitored temp table growth from a batch analytics job. The failover to the replica was delayed because the replica was 10 minutes behind due to replication lag.
